twitch_info.title: playing + giving feedback for kaurosu's fangame!!

message.body: Niec, progress for me has been slower than i like. Thas prob because im too focused in trying to write a good story instead of just writing stuff
weird shape spikes are too gimmicky for me, I would prefer if all spikes were normal
that is not a mini spike amelia use the proper term
it would be so fucked up if a game would just let you softlock by doing something so simple
yea im about to finish a video
oh yea we can but you are the one who summons
fangame awards? pssh ive got no time for that the yearly ocarina of time tas showcase is that day
oh actually lets do it after your stream tomorrow
are you prerecording your voice lines that is terrible
or tomorrow because you are right we have to do a few things first
have you heard of the concept of multiple speedrun categories
Hello im cooking rn but i will be watching
Theres no saveblocks mostlt because id easy
There you can save at any point
Oooo thats true im working to improve my needle 🥺
Those are because the trigger i would have to spawn another block to fix it
Do the jump to the roght pls
you like fell through the block i think thats what kaurosu saw
Tgere is suposed to be a secret
amelia ragebait on testing is crazy work
i mean i can skip roulette that was probably happening anyways
not like you join anyways so who cares
well yes its tomorrow and friday
why are you ragebaited its true you are late to them so its not like you lose much
and im going to be editing hardcore so im probably not joining
Therrs a lot of grammar mistakes in the following text
id do it today but i would like to sneak in my last stream in a bit maybe
I already spotted a lot of "i" and things 😭
i mean i could also just go completely insane and not stream at all and have zero fun?
either way im wasting time because my brain will be mush or cus i will be having fun
Bosses havent been  nerf in easy yet, if you feel like skipping it tell me please
Ez means some spikes destroys so its easier
yea i wish it didnt take this long as well im also a bit sorry but its how it is, next year i already have plans to have even more time hopefully
maybe that spike leaves on normal too
its not that bad you will see, but we need to write a bit first, cus like we have the stuff but its written very loosely
I think there is a higher chance of you fucking up if you have an strict script
its just a guide, it barely has human language
but freaking out would be so entertaining
i think everyone is feeling the freak out i mean we can practice and i think that will help but the real thing is always a whole other thing
wait i just realized we can genuinely practice that as well and it doesnt have to be on the rehearsal
so you will get to see it
doing well, just got home from work
it would be so cool if you had to actually control the character and do some needle jumps to get to the center and be allowed to talk
i wont be the one in control during the show of course but it will be very close
everyone keeps watching in silence until you beat it
usually only stream on weekends due to work, starting roughly 1pm AEDT which is uhh, 4 hours ago for me
May be a little cringe aware
she's doing the world a service
This boss is not nerfed if want to skip check dm uwu
wait was the anime girl a chess piece
Is bug im just being silly xd ty
this is steph dola the other was tet something pay attention
used to be full time mario maker streamer, retired to part time streamer focusing on super mario world rom hacks then moved on to fan games, now I play both smw and fangames
the red thing is suposed to be an allign to make the corner easier
so uh, I think a year or so playing fan games
you can save down tehre bw
my clearlist is so small for a year lmao wtf https://delicious-fruit.com/profile.php?u=10468

i think i can chance the spike so the allifn is easier

hell i got filtered by boshy like 10 times when i was starting, i still havent cleared it (although mostly cus i havent gone back to it since then)
you have double jump stop acting like a victim
have you ever seen that dog image
my stream hates needle lol but I mostly love the adventure ones

Like I appreciate how old ones are more adventurery but like that has its own problems and limitations
cheating in fangames and in arguments
hello amelia and you and also gab and also kayin and anyone else
they invent new mechanics and stuff

kid me was humble, now im greedmaxxing
